"'''The Long, Bad Day'''" is a 2-page comic that first appeared in ''[[Star Wars Tales 16]]'' and was collected in ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 4]]''. The script was written by [[Mike Denning]], art was by [[Lucas Marangon]] and letters were by [[Steve Dutro]]. It takes place in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Plot summary==
As [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] attempts to return to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] in his [[TIE Advanced x1/Legends|TIE fighter]] following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|battle of Yavin]], he is confronted by the mocking spirit of [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Furiously, Vader thumps his fist on the control panel where Kenobi has appeared, causing one of his wings to fall off. Again Vader attempts to strike the spirit of Kenobi, this time causing him to fire a torpedo into Grand Moff [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin's]] escape pod. After causing another wing to fall off, Vader is picked up by the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Xamaural]]'', as Kenobi sarcastically tells him to "Sit up straight."
